notes: PetiteJerusalem is a Vue 3 application, not a React component library. Claude Design live-renders React from a compiled bundle, so the Vue single-file components cannot be synced as live preview cards. This config scopes the sync to the design tokens (the Tailwind v4 @theme block) plus a conventions guide. projectId is intentionally unset: DesignSync could not authorize in the environment where this was prepared. See NOTES.md.
